title: Enhanced Shelves
description: Makes items on shelves slightly larger for a clearer, more detailed look.
body:
Enhanced Shelves gives your Minecraft shelves a fresh, refined look by increasing the size of displayed items. Every item placed on a shelf now appears slightly larger and clearer, making your builds look more natural and visually balanced. The pack focuses purely on visual improvement — no gameplay or mechanics are changed. Whether you’re decorating interiors, organizing displays, or building aesthetic showcases, this subtle tweak makes items stand out just enough to feel more realistic without breaking the original Minecraft style.

Perfect for builders, decorators, and anyone who wants shelves that actually show off the items on them.
